openingCard.title: ACL Digital Platform — everything operations and business teams need to streamline workflows and make faster, data-driven decisions.
openingCard.subtitle: streamline workflows and make faster, data-driven decisions

scenes.title: Rheem TotalView
scenes.narration: Welcome to ACL Digital Platform. In the next few minutes, you'll see exactly why operations and business teams choose us to streamline workflows and make faster, data-driven decisions. Let's start with Rheem TotalView.
scenes.description: Rheem TotalView highlights Consumption Tracking, Alerts and Alarm Feed, Geospatial Device Map. Track every consumption metric across sites to identify savings opportunities immediately..

scenes.title: Rheem TotalView
scenes.narration: With Role-Based Access Overview, your team can see every user's roles and permissions at a glance. That means you spot risks early and breeze through compliance checks without long manual audits.
scenes.salesHook: Everything you need, right where you need it.
scenes.description: Rheem TotalView highlights Role-Based Access Overview, User Directory Table, Status Indicators. Instantly see who has access to what — and spot risks fast..

scenes.title: Rheem TotalView
scenes.narration: With Energy Consumption Tracking, your team can pinpoint where and when energy is being wasted. That lets you drive down costs and make confident decisions that deliver real savings.
scenes.description: Rheem TotalView highlights Energy Consumption Tracking, Comfort Metrics Overview. Monitor energy use across every facility, uncovering costly patterns quickly..

scenes.title: Rheem TotalView
scenes.narration: And that's ACL Digital Platform — giving operations and business teams the visibility, control, and speed to act on what matters most. Device Status Overview is just one piece of a platform built to transform how your business operates. Schedule a live demo today and see what we can unlock together.
scenes.salesHook: Everything you need, right where you need it.
scenes.description: Rheem TotalView highlights Device Status Overview. View every device’s status in one screen — online, offline, or pending..

highlightTarget.description: Device Status Overview KPI metric card
